name: Edge Golf
address: US, 18 Edgewater Town Center, Edgewater, NJ 07020
about: Edge Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Edgewater, NJ, offering a realistic golf experience with advanced Golfzon simulators and lie-adjusting mats that mirror real course conditions. The facility provides a premium environment featuring both open bays and private rooms, suitable for practice, play, and lessons. It is designed for golfers of all levels, from beginners to experienced players, with a focus on community and improvement. Membership options are available, offering access to exclusive pricing on bay usage, pro shop discounts, and special events. The venue also features a pro shop and regularly hosts clinics, tournaments, and social gatherings, making it a comprehensive destination for indoor golf.
why_golfers_like_it: Realistic Golfzon simulators with advanced shot analytics
Lie-adjusting mats that recreate fairway, rough, and bunker conditions
World-class virtual courses from Pebble Beach to St. Andrews
PGA-certified coaching and personalized training plans
Complimentary beverages for members during designated hours

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned, but may allow outside food.
Complimentary beverages available for members during designated Member Hours. BYOB policy not explicitly stated.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator brand with advanced shot analytics and lie-adjusting mats.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own clubs. However, club fitting services are available to help you optimize your equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not explicitly stated. Members may receive complimentary beverages during designated hours, but BYOB for non-members is unclear.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the number of players and pace of play. Typically, a round can take 1-2 hours, but this may vary based on group size and simulator availability.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Edge Golf offers junior memberships, clinics, and programs specifically designed for young golfers, making it a family-friendly environment.
